name: dod-guard-monorepo
description: MCP server plugins: dod-guard (anti-cheat DoD verification), obsidian-rag (RAG/memory on Obsidian vaults), evomcp (evolutionary solver with best-of-N + repair chains), and gitevo (evolutionary git branching for LLM agents)

plugins.name: dod-guard
plugins.description: Lock DoD proofs in MCP storage with anti-cheat verification. Ships 6 skills: /interview (structured requirements with adversarial spec review), /ratchet (multi-step problem solving with verification gates), /clean-house (hunt duplicate/obsolete implementations), /step-by-step (multi-step sequential execution with 2 specialized agents), /cheap-step (step-by-step with cheap-worker fanout), and /adversarial-workflow (4-phase adversarial choreography — spec review, test audit, implementation review, structural gates).

plugins.name: obsidian-rag
plugins.description: RAG/memory MCP server on an Obsidian vault. Semantic search, note CRUD, memory recall, backlink traversal — all local, all offline.

plugins.name: evomcp
plugins.description: Evolutionary solver MCP — cheap-model fanout with best-of-N + repair chains and scalar-fitness evolution, gated by dod-guard verification. Spawns claude -p (DeepSeek) instances with diverse strategies, verifies, repairs, escalates stuck nodes. Ships /cascade skill with 3 agents.

plugins.name: gitevo
plugins.description: Evolutionary git branching for LLM agents — checkpoint, spawn parallel exploration branches, learn from failures, merge winners, clean artifacts. evo_export_lessons bridges to obsidian-rag for persistent memory.
